title: Opik Features
description: Review each feature in order to unlock the next.

nodes.label: Opik Platform
nodes.summary: Open-source LLM observability, evaluation, and optimization by Comet.
nodes.details: Opik covers the generative AI lifecycle: develop with traces, evaluate with metrics and test suites, monitor production, and optimize prompts and agents.
detailBullets: Covers develop, evaluate, monitor, and optimize for generative AI apps.
Open-source from Comet, with self-hosted and cloud options.
This wizard uses the self-hosted stack on your machine.

nodes.label: Tracing
nodes.summary: Hierarchical logs of LLM calls, tools, and agent steps.
nodes.details: Each user interaction becomes a trace composed of spans. Spans capture inputs, outputs, timing, model metadata, and errors. Essential for debugging RAG and agent pipelines.
detailBullets: Each user interaction becomes a trace made of spans.
Spans capture inputs, outputs, timing, model metadata, and errors.
Essential for debugging RAG and agent pipelines.

nodes.label: Spans & Feedback
nodes.summary: Annotate traces with scores and human or automated feedback.
nodes.details: Feedback scores on traces and spans power dashboards, online rules, and review queues. Attach thumbs-up/down, custom metrics, or LLM-judge results.
detailBullets: Attach scores and notes to traces or individual spans.
Use thumbs, custom metrics, or LLM-judge results.
Feeds dashboards, online rules, and review queues.

nodes.label: Evaluation
nodes.summary: Systematic quality measurement with datasets, metrics, and test suites.
nodes.details: Run experiments over datasets, compare model versions, and define pass/fail assertions in natural language. Supports 30+ built-in metrics plus custom evaluators.
detailBullets: Run experiments over datasets and compare model versions.
Define pass/fail checks in natural language.
Includes 30+ built-in metrics plus custom evaluators.

nodes.label: LLM-as-a-Judge
nodes.summary: Use an LLM to score outputs for relevance, hallucination, moderation, and more.
nodes.details: LLM judges automate subjective checks at scale in offline experiments, CI, and online production rules, so teams catch regressions without reviewing every trace.
detailBullets: An LLM scores outputs for relevance, hallucination, moderation, and more.
Works in offline experiments, CI, and live production rules.
Helps catch regressions without reviewing every trace by hand.

nodes.label: Datasets & Experiments
nodes.summary: Versioned test data and side-by-side run comparison.
nodes.details: Curate datasets from production traces or imports, run evaluation experiments against them, and compare scores across prompt or model changes before shipping.
detailBullets: Curate test data from production traces or imports.
Compare scores across prompt or model changes.
Use before shipping so quality stays measurable.

nodes.label: Production Monitoring
nodes.summary: Dashboards and online rules for live traffic.
nodes.details: Ingest production traces at scale, track latency, cost, and error trends, and configure online evaluation rules that flag low-quality or unsafe outputs automatically.
detailBullets: Ingest live traces at scale.
Track latency, cost, and error trends.
Online rules can flag low-quality or unsafe outputs automatically.

nodes.label: Prompt Playground
nodes.summary: Iterate on prompts and models in the UI.
nodes.details: Test prompt variants, swap models, and compare outputs without redeploying application code. Prompts can be versioned and linked to experiments.
detailBullets: Try prompt variants and swap models in the UI.
Compare outputs without redeploying app code.
Prompts can be versioned and linked to experiments.

nodes.label: Integrations
nodes.summary: SDKs and framework adapters for Python and TypeScript.
nodes.details: Drop-in support for LangChain, LlamaIndex, OpenAI, Anthropic, CrewAI, and many others. Use @track decorators or framework callbacks to emit traces with minimal code changes.
detailBullets: Python and TypeScript SDKs plus framework adapters.
Works with LangChain, LlamaIndex, OpenAI, Anthropic, CrewAI, and more.
Emit traces with decorators or callbacks and minimal code changes.

nodes.label: Agent Optimizer
nodes.summary: Automated prompt and agent improvement algorithms.
nodes.details: Opik Agent Optimizer runs optimization loops over your traces and prompts to improve task completion, reduce cost, or meet custom objectives. Complements manual playground iteration.
detailBullets: Runs optimization loops over traces and prompts.
Aims to improve task completion, cost, or custom goals.
Complements manual playground iteration.

nodes.label: Guardrails
nodes.summary: Safety and content screening for LLM outputs.
nodes.details: Guardrails help block or flag toxic, off-topic, or policy-violating content before it reaches users. Usable in development and production pipelines.
detailBullets: Screen content for toxic, off-topic, or policy-violating output.
Usable in development and production pipelines.
Helps keep unsafe responses from reaching users.

nodes.label: Self-Hosted Stack
nodes.summary: Run Opik locally with Docker via opik.sh.
nodes.details: The comet-ml/opik repo ships opik.sh to start frontend, API, and backing services. This onboarding tool clones Opik, runs opik.sh, and verifies the chat demo writes traces to your local instance.
detailBullets: Run Opik locally with Docker via opik.sh.
This tool clones Opik, starts the stack, and verifies chat traces.
Best for local learning and air-gapped setups.
